title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.61.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common) | `v0.60.4` -> `v0.61.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.61.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.61.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.60.4/v0.61.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.60.4/v0.61.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.61.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.61.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.60.4...v0.61.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.55.0, c/image to v5.32.0, c/common to v0.60.0, then v0.61.0-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2102](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2102)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.19.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2105](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2105)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.34.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2101](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2101)
-   Use SystemContext when creating manifest references by [@​mheon](https://redirect.github.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2107](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2107)
-   cgroups: systemdDestroyConn ignores stopped units by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2108](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2108)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.8.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2109](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2109)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.23.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2110](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2110)
-   Use the WSL convention for the windows machines default volumes by [@​l0rd](https://redirect.github.com/l0rd) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2100](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2100)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/term to v0.23.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2114](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2114)
